title: Experimental Linux support for the Fairphone 6 wide camera · nondescriptpointer
content_html:
Published 21 Jul 2026

Background

The Fairphone 6 is an interesting target for mainline Linux and postmarketOS for a few reasons:

  • It has relatively modern hardware compared with most other supported postmarketOS devices.
  • Fairphone invests in mainline Linux support, with Luca Weiss driving much of the development.
  • Those efforts have already provided promising initial support for the hardware.
  • Fairphone deliberately allows alternative operating systems.
  • Fairphone aims to support its devices for a long time, so the phone could provide a stable base for future work.

There are still two main blockers to making the device generally usable: onboard audio and camera support. I am working on a project that needs QR scanning, so I used that as an opportunity to see whether I could get at least one camera working. Disclaimer: I heavily relied on LLM assistance to make this work.

Fairphone 6 cameras

The Fairphone 6 has three cameras:

  • Rear: Sony IMX896
  • Front: Samsung S5KKD1
  • Wide: OmniVision OV13B10

The Sony and Samsung sensors have no mainline Linux drivers, but the OmniVision OV13B10 has a mainline driver. The ultra-wide camera is sufficient for QR scanning.

A phone camera is not a single device. On Qualcomm SoCs, the capture path is a chain:

image sensor  →  CSI-2 D-PHY  →  CSIPHY  →  CSID  →  ISP (VFE/TFE)  →  memory
   (I2C)         (MIPI lanes)   (decode)   (demux)   (write engine)     (DMA)

There are also several supporting components, including a camera clock controller (camcc), the CCI (Qualcomm's dedicated camera I2C controller), power rails, and a VCM (voice-coil motor) for autofocus.

The downstream vendor Android kernel drives all of this with Qualcomm's substantial, proprietary CAMX/cam-kernel stack. On mainline, the equivalent is the much smaller qcom-camss driver, with libcamera providing userspace integration and image processing.

To get the OmniVision camera working, I had to teach qcom-camss about the SoC's specific blocks, describe the hardware in the device tree, enable the sensor driver, and configure libcamera to turn raw Bayer frames into images that applications could use.

Initial exploration

Before starting the implementation, I wanted to find out how much of the work was new and how much could be ported from hardware that mainline already supported. That would show whether the project was feasible without manufacturer support.

The initial research was encouraging:

  • The FP6's SoC is Qualcomm milos (SM7635). The downstream board is codenamed volcano, and postmarketOS already boots it with a mainline-based kernel fork.
  • The camera hardware blocks are TFE665 (a thin-front-end ISP), CSID665, and CSIPHY v2.2.1.
  • The camcc clock controller and CCI are already present in the kernel fork.
  • The three cameras are:
    • Main: Sony IMX896, with no mainline driver.
    • Ultra-wide: OmniVision OV13B10, with a mainline driver that supports ACPI/x86 only.
    • Front: Samsung S5KKD1, with no mainline driver.

That made the target obvious: the OV13B10 ultra-wide. It is a 13 MP sensor with an existing mainline driver, and its wide field of view is suitable for QR scanning.

When I compared the downstream register headers (cam_tfe665.h, cam_csiphy_2_2_1_hwreg.h, and cam_tfe_bus.c) with mainline qcom-camss, I found that TFE665 is essentially the same IP as TFE530, which mainline already supports. The register layouts are identical. Only the base offsets of the internal blocks differ, because the write bus lives at a different address. Similarly, the CSID665 RDI registers match the supported CSID, and CSIPHY v2.2.1 belongs to the same three-phase PHY family.

This meant that I could port existing drivers instead of writing everything from scratch.

Step 1: Port the capture subsystem into the kernel

qcom-camss was not yet available on milos, so I had to connect the existing pieces.

TFE665 ISP driver

I added a new camss-vfe-665.c, modelled directly on the mainline TFE530 driver (camss-vfe-340.c). Because the register contents are identical, the driver logic is the same. The main difference is that milos places the ISP control block and write-bus block at different offsets. The bus register base moved from 0xa00 to 0x1800, and encapsulating that offset shift accounted for most of the work.

CSID665 and CSIPHY v2.2.1

  • CSID665 reused the existing gen-2 CSID operations because its RDI register offsets were identical.
  • CSIPHY v2.2.1 needed a new lane-configuration table and D-PHY tuning values for this revision. I transcribed the lane register sequence and the approximately 1.1 Gbps/lane ("500 Msps") data-rate and AFE settings from the downstream cam_csiphy_2_2_1_hwreg.h. The PHY's register window was at offset 0x1000.

Resources, compatible, and device tree

In camss.c, I described milos's capture complex: four CSIPHYs, three CSIDs, three TFEs, their clocks, interconnects, and power domains. I also registered a new qcom,milos-camss compatible. In the device tree, I added the camss@ac13000 node with its registers, IRQs, clocks, interconnects, IOMMUs, GDSC, and CSI input ports, along with the MCLK and reset pinctrl states.

Missing register-bus clock

I ran into a problem at this point. The driver bound, but reading the TFE hardware-version register returned 0x0, and reset timed out as if the block were not powered. The fix was a clock that was not obviously an ISP clock: CAM_CC_SOC_AHB_CLK. It gated the AHB register bus used by the whole camera complex, including the CCI. Without it, register accesses silently returned zero. I added that clock and the CAMNOC AXI clocks, then set the CAMNOC data-path clock rate. The ISP came alive with hw_version = 0x30000000.

This suggests that, on Qualcomm hardware, a block that reads as zero may be missing a clock or power domain on its access path.

Step 2: Bring up the OV13B10 sensor

The mainline ov13b10 driver exists, but it is written for x86/ACPI laptops and only matches through ACPI. I made changes in two places.

Making the driver usable on ARM and device tree

  • I added an OpenFirmware match table (ovti,ov13b10) so the driver could probe from the device tree.
  • I described the sensor in milos-fairphone-fp6.dts. It lives on the CCI I2C bus at address 0x36, needs MCLK1 at 19.2 MHz, a reset GPIO, and power rails. For this experimental bring-up, I simply forced the regulators on instead of fully sequencing them.

2 small details

  1. Lane numbering. The downstream device tree used data-lanes = <1 2 3 4>, while mainline's convention is zero-indexed: <0 1 2 3>. With the wrong numbering, CSIPHY programmed a lane mask with lane 0 missing, and the PHY never locked.
  2. Which CSIPHY? The FP6 wiring routed the ultra-wide camera to CSIPHY1. Getting this from the downstream device tree instead of guessing saved a lot of trial and error.

At this point, the sensor probed successfully, the chip ID was read correctly over I2C, CSIPHY reported lane activity, and the ISP produced frames that were completely black.

Step 3: The all-zero frames mystery

This was the main bug. Frames arrived at the right rate and size, and buf_done fired, but every pixel was zero. That was also true when I enabled the sensor's internal colour-bar test pattern, which was generated inside the sensor and should have appeared regardless of the scene. The data path delivered frame timing, but not pixel data.

The kernel log provided a clue: VFE0: Bad config violation. The ISP's write engine reported a consumer/config violation once per frame because the write master's configuration did not match the incoming data.

When I dug into the downstream cam_tfe_bus.c, the difference became clear. The RDI write-master's packer format depends on the ISP bus width:

  • TFE530 (qcm2290, the target of the mainline driver) has a 64-bit RDI bus, so it uses packer 0xa.
  • TFE665 (milos) has a 128-bit RDI bus, so it needs packer 0x0.

The mainline driver hard-coded the 64-bit value. On milos, that was wrong, and the write engine refused to write the pixels. Changing the register value from PLAIN64 (0xa) to 0x0 turned the all-zero frames into real images: the maximum pixel value was 255, the full colour-bar pattern appeared, and the violations stopped.

That was the point at which the camera physically worked: OV13B10 → CSIPHY → CSID → TFE665 → DDR, delivering genuine Bayer frames.

Step 4: Raw Bayer to libcamera

Raw frames were enough for a QR script, but a usable camera needs libcamera, the userspace framework used by modern Linux camera applications. libcamera 0.7.2 already recognises the milos qcom-camss graph through its generic simple pipeline handler. Its software ISP debayered the raw frames to RGB, with GPU acceleration on the Adreno through EGL, at approximately 30 fps out of the box. cam and GStreamer's libcamerasrc produced clean images immediately.

Auto-exposure was the part that did not work. Images were dark or overly bright, and the log reported Failed to create camera sensor helper for ov13b10. libcamera's software auto-exposure and gain loop needed a small per-sensor helper to map the sensor's gain register value to a real gain multiplier. libcamera includes helpers for several sensors, but not this one.

The fix was small. The OV13B10's analogue gain is linear, with 0x80 = 1×, or gain = code / 128, which is the same behaviour as several other OmniVision sensors. I added a class to libcamera's sensor-helper database:

class CameraSensorHelperOv13b10 : public CameraSensorHelper {
public:
    CameraSensorHelperOv13b10() { gain_ = AnalogueGainLinear{ 1, 0, 0, 128 }; }
};
REGISTER_CAMERA_SENSOR_HELPER("ov13b10", CameraSensorHelperOv13b10)

The auto-exposure loop started converging immediately. I also added an entry to libcamera's sensor-properties database and backported the sensor driver's V4L2 crop and get_selection support, which libcamera uses for pixel-array geometry. After that, GStreamer and PipeWire received a properly exposed feed. Once I installed the PipeWire libcamera plugin, the camera appeared in desktop applications as a normal video source.

The images are still somewhat overexposed in some situations, so the helper might need further work.

Step 5: Focus, orientation, and resolution issues

I still had a few issues to fine-tune.

Autofocus

The ultra-wide camera has a voice-coil motor (VCM) for focus. The downstream device tree suggests that it is an Awinic AW86017. After powering the autofocus rail, which is controlled by a GPIO-driven regulator, and probing the CCI I2C bus, I found a device at address 0x0c that spoke the de facto standard DW9714 10-bit DAC protocol. The mainline dw9714 driver drives it directly.

A focus sweep confirmed that the lens moved physically and that sharpness peaked clearly at a middle setting. libcamera associated the lens with the sensor through a lens-focus device-tree link.

Unfortunately, libcamera's software ISP has no autofocus algorithm. Rather than leave the lens parked at infinity and produce blurry close-ups, I set a sensible fixed focus tuned for arm's-length QR scanning and documents using a small udev rule. The setting could be adjusted as needed, or the focus could be controlled from software.

Orientation

The sensor is mounted at an angle relative to the phone's portrait orientation, so previews initially appeared sideways. Setting the device-tree rotation and orientation properties allowed libcamera-aware applications to display the feed upright.

Binned modes

The OV13B10 driver advertised several resolutions, including 2×2-binned half-resolution modes. On this CAMSS path, the binned modes produced garbled, sheared output. Their readout geometry did not match the declared frame size, while full-resolution and a couple of other modes were clean.

Rather than ship a broken preview, I disabled the two broken modes so libcamera would select only working ones. The trade-off is that, because the software ISP crops instead of scaling, a 1080p preview is a centre crop of a larger mode. It is slightly zoomed in rather than showing the full ultra-wide field of view.

The result is a live, upright, auto-exposed, in-focus preview in GNOME Camera / Snapshot, and QR scanning works.

Sources

The patches and related files needed to reproduce these results are available in this repository:

github.com/nondescriptpointer/fairphone6-wide-camera-linux

Limitations

This is an experimental start, not production camera support.

  • Only the ultra-wide (OV13B10) works. The main (IMX896) and front (S5KKD1) sensors have no mainline drivers.
  • There is no autofocus. libcamera's software ISP has no contrast-AF loop, so focus is a fixed compromise position. Proper autofocus would require an AF algorithm in the software ISP or an app-side loop to drive the VCM.
  • The preview field of view is cropped at common resolutions because the 2×2-binned sensor modes are broken on this path and the software ISP crops instead of scaling. Fixing the binned-mode register sequences, or adding a scaler, would restore the full ultra-wide field of view.
  • Power sequencing is simplified. Regulators are forced on instead of being sequenced, and the VCM draws a little idle current while held at a fixed focus position. This is fine for experimentation, but needs proper power management for daily use.
  • The ISP is software-only. All debayering, auto-exposure, and auto-white-balance processing happens in software, with GPU assistance. It works well for QR scanning and casual use, but does not provide the image quality of a tuned hardware ISP pipeline.
  • I did not spend time optimising image quality. Further optimisation is likely needed to get better photos from the sensor.

Next steps

  • Fix the binned modes to restore the full field of view.
  • Write proper power sequencing.
  • Prepare the parts that are ready for upstreaming.

sentences.en: Rear: Sony IMX896

blocks.html_en: • Front: Samsung S5KKD1

sentences.en: Front: Samsung S5KKD1

sentences.en: Wide: OmniVision OV13B10
sentences.zh: 广角：OmniVision OV13B10

blocks.html_en: The Sony and Samsung sensors have no mainline Linux drivers, but the OmniVision OV13B10 has a mainline driver. The ultra-wide camera is sufficient for QR scanning.

sentences.en: The Sony and Samsung sensors have no mainline Linux drivers, but the OmniVision OV13B10 has a mainline driver.
sentences.zh: Sony 和 Samsung 传感器没有主线 Linux 驱动程序，但 OmniVision OV13B10 有主线驱动程序。

sentences.en: The ultra-wide camera is sufficient for QR scanning.
sentences.zh: 超广角摄像头足以进行二维码扫描。

blocks.html_en: A phone camera is not a single device. On Qualcomm SoCs, the capture path is a chain:

sentences.en: A phone camera is not a single device.
sentences.zh: 手机摄像头不是一个单一的设备。

sentences.en: On Qualcomm SoCs, the capture path is a chain:
sentences.zh: 在 Qualcomm SoC 上，捕获路径是一条链：

blocks.html_en: There are also several supporting components, including a camera clock controller (camcc), the CCI (Qualcomm's dedicated camera I2C controller), power rails, and a VCM (voice-coil motor) for autofocus.

sentences.en: There are also several supporting components, including a camera clock controller (camcc), the CCI (Qualcomm's dedicated camera I2C controller), power rails, and a VCM (voice-coil motor) for autofocus.
sentences.zh: 还有几个支持组件，包括相机时钟控制器 (camcc)、CCI（高通专用相机 I2C 控制器）、电源轨和用于自动对焦的 VCM（音圈电机）。

blocks.html_en: The downstream vendor Android kernel drives all of this with Qualcomm's substantial, proprietary CAMX/cam-kernel stack. On mainline, the equivalent is the much smaller qcom-camss driver, with libcamera providing userspace integration and image processing.

sentences.en: The downstream vendor Android kernel drives all of this with Qualcomm's substantial, proprietary CAMX/cam-kernel stack.
sentences.zh: 下游供应商 Android 内核通过 Qualcomm 强大的专有 CAMX/cam 内核堆栈驱动所有这一切。

sentences.en: On mainline, the equivalent is the much smaller qcom-camss driver, with libcamera providing userspace integration and image processing.
sentences.zh: 在主线上，等效的是更小的 qcom-camss 驱动程序，其中 libcamera 提供用户空间集成和图像处理。

blocks.html_en: To get the OmniVision camera working, I had to teach qcom-camss about the SoC's specific blocks, describe the hardware in the device tree, enable the sensor driver, and configure libcamera to turn raw Bayer frames into images that applications could use.

sentences.en: To get the OmniVision camera working, I had to teach qcom-camss about the SoC's specific blocks, describe the hardware in the device tree, enable the sensor driver, and configure libcamera to turn raw Bayer frames into images that applications could use.
sentences.zh: 为了让 OmniVision 摄像头正常工作，我必须向 qcom-camss 传授 SoC 的特定模块、描述设备树中的硬件、启用传感器驱动程序并配置 libcamera 以将原始拜耳帧转换为应用程序可以使用的图像。

blocks.html_en: Initial exploration

sentences.en: Initial exploration

blocks.html_en: Before starting the implementation, I wanted to find out how much of the work was new and how much could be ported from hardware that mainline already supported. That would show whether the project was feasible without manufacturer support.

sentences.en: Before starting the implementation, I wanted to find out how much of the work was new and how much could be ported from hardware that mainline already supported.
sentences.zh: 在开始实施之前，我想了解有多少工作是新的，有多少可以从主线已经支持的硬件移植。

sentences.en: That would show whether the project was feasible without manufacturer support.
sentences.zh: 这将表明该项目在没有制造商支持的情况下是否可行。

blocks.html_en: The initial research was encouraging:

sentences.en: The initial research was encouraging:
sentences.zh: 最初的研究令人鼓舞：

blocks.html_en: • The FP6's SoC is Qualcomm milos (SM7635). The downstream board is codenamed volcano, and postmarketOS already boots it with a mainline-based kernel fork.

sentences.en: The FP6's SoC is Qualcomm milos (SM7635).
sentences.zh: FP6的SoC是高通milos（SM7635）。

sentences.zh: 下游板代号为火山，postmarketOS 已经使用基于主线的内核分支启动它。

blocks.html_en: • The camera hardware blocks are TFE665 (a thin-front-end ISP), CSID665, and CSIPHY v2.2.1.

sentences.en: The camera hardware blocks are TFE665 (a thin-front-end ISP), CSID665, and CSIPHY v2.2.1.
sentences.zh: 相机硬件模块为TFE665（瘦前端ISP）、CSID665和CSIPHY v2.2.1。

sentences.en: The camcc clock controller and CCI are already present in the kernel fork.

sentences.en: Front: Samsung S5KKD1, with no mainline driver.

blocks.html_en: • Main: Sony IMX896, with no mainline driver.

blocks.html_en: • Ultra-wide: OmniVision OV13B10, with a mainline driver that supports ACPI/x86 only.

blocks.html_en: • Front: Samsung S5KKD1, with no mainline driver.

sentences.en: Front: Samsung S5KKD1, with no mainline driver.

blocks.html_en: That made the target obvious: the OV13B10 ultra-wide. It is a 13 MP sensor with an existing mainline driver, and its wide field of view is suitable for QR scanning.

sentences.en: That made the target obvious: the OV13B10 ultra-wide.
sentences.zh: 这使得目标显而易见：OV13B10 超宽。

sentences.en: It is a 13 MP sensor with an existing mainline driver, and its wide field of view is suitable for QR scanning.
sentences.zh: 它是一款带有现有主线驱动器的 13 MP 传感器，其宽视场适合 QR 扫描。

blocks.html_en: When I compared the downstream register headers (cam_tfe665.h, cam_csiphy_2_2_1_hwreg.h, and cam_tfe_bus.c) with mainline qcom-camss, I found that TFE665 is essentially the same IP as TFE530, which mainline already supports. The register layouts are identical. Only the base offsets of the internal blocks differ, because the write bus lives at a different address. Similarly, the CSID665 RDI registers match the supported CSID, and CSIPHY v2.2.1 belongs to the same three-phase PHY family.

sentences.en: When I compared the downstream register headers (cam_tfe665.h, cam_csiphy_2_2_1_hwreg.h, and cam_tfe_bus.c) with mainline qcom-camss, I found that TFE665 is essentially the same IP as TFE530, which mainline already supports.
sentences.zh: 当我将下游寄存器头（cam_tfe665.h、cam_csiphy_2_2_1_hwreg.h 和 cam_tfe_bus.c）与主线 qcom-camss 进行比较时，我发现 TFE665 与主线已经支持的 TFE530 本质上是相同的 IP。

sentences.en: The register layouts are identical.
sentences.zh: 寄存器布局是相同的。

sentences.en: Only the base offsets of the internal blocks differ, because the write bus lives at a different address.
sentences.zh: 只有内部块的基址偏移不同，因为写总线位于不同的地址。

sentences.en: Similarly, the CSID665 RDI registers match the supported CSID, and CSIPHY v2.2.1 belongs to the same three-phase PHY family.
sentences.zh: 同样，CSID665 RDI 寄存器与支持的 CSID 匹配，CSIPHY v2.2.1 属于相同的三相 PHY 系列。

blocks.html_en: This meant that I could port existing drivers instead of writing everything from scratch.

sentences.en: This meant that I could port existing drivers instead of writing everything from scratch.
sentences.zh: 这意味着我可以移植现有的驱动程序，而不是从头开始编写所有内容。

blocks.html_en: Step 1: Port the capture subsystem into the kernel

sentences.en: Step 1: Port the capture subsystem into the kernel
sentences.zh: 第 1 步：将捕获子系统移植到内核中

blocks.html_en: qcom-camss was not yet available on milos, so I had to connect the existing pieces.

sentences.en: qcom-camss was not yet available on milos, so I had to connect the existing pieces.
sentences.zh: qcom-camss 在 milos 上尚不可用，因此我必须连接现有的部分。

blocks.html_en: TFE665 ISP driver

sentences.en: TFE665 ISP driver
sentences.zh: TFE665 ISP 驱动程序

blocks.html_en: I added a new camss-vfe-665.c, modelled directly on the mainline TFE530 driver (camss-vfe-340.c). Because the register contents are identical, the driver logic is the same. The main difference is that milos places the ISP control block and write-bus block at different offsets. The bus register base moved from 0xa00 to 0x1800, and encapsulating that offset shift accounted for most of the work.

sentences.en: I added a new camss-vfe-665.c, modelled directly on the mainline TFE530 driver (camss-vfe-340.c).
sentences.zh: 我添加了一个新的 camss-vfe-665.c，直接在主线 TFE530 驱动程序 (camss-vfe-340.c) 上建模。

sentences.en: Because the register contents are identical, the driver logic is the same.
sentences.zh: 由于寄存器内容相同，因此驱动程序逻辑相同。

sentences.en: The main difference is that milos places the ISP control block and write-bus block at different offsets.
sentences.zh: 主要区别在于 milos 将 ISP 控制块和写总线块放置在不同的偏移处。

sentences.en: The bus register base moved from 0xa00 to 0x1800, and encapsulating that offset shift accounted for most of the work.
sentences.zh: 总线寄存器基址从 0xa00 移动到 0x1800，封装该偏移量移位占据了大部分工作。

blocks.html_en: CSID665 and CSIPHY v2.2.1

sentences.en: CSID665 and CSIPHY v2.2.1
sentences.zh: CSID665 和 CSIPHY v2.2.1

blocks.html_en: • CSID665 reused the existing gen-2 CSID operations because its RDI register offsets were identical.

sentences.en: CSID665 reused the existing gen-2 CSID operations because its RDI register offsets were identical.
sentences.zh: CSID665 重用了现有的第 2 代 CSID 操作，因为它的 RDI 寄存器偏移量是相同的。

blocks.html_en: • CSIPHY v2.2.1 needed a new lane-configuration table and D-PHY tuning values for this revision. I transcribed the lane register sequence and the approximately 1.1 Gbps/lane ("500 Msps") data-rate and AFE settings from the downstream cam_csiphy_2_2_1_hwreg.h. The PHY's register window was at offset 0x1000.

sentences.en: CSIPHY v2.2.1 needed a new lane-configuration table and D-PHY tuning values for this revision.
sentences.zh: 此版本的 CSIPHY v2.2.1 需要新的通道配置表和 D-PHY 调整值。

sentences.en: I transcribed the lane register sequence and the approximately 1.1 Gbps/lane ("500 Msps") data-rate and AFE settings from the downstream cam_csiphy_2_2_1_hwreg.h.
sentences.zh: 我从下游 cam_csiphy_2_2_1_hwreg.h 转录了通道寄存器序列以及大约 1.1 Gbps/通道（“500 Msps”）数据速率和 AFE 设置。

sentences.en: The PHY's register window was at offset 0x1000.
sentences.zh: PHY 的寄存器窗口位于偏移量 0x1000 处。

blocks.html_en: Resources, compatible, and device tree

sentences.en: Resources, compatible, and device tree
sentences.zh: 资源、兼容和设备树

blocks.html_en: In camss.c, I described milos's capture complex: four CSIPHYs, three CSIDs, three TFEs, their clocks, interconnects, and power domains. I also registered a new qcom,milos-camss compatible. In the device tree, I added the camss@ac13000 node with its registers, IRQs, clocks, interconnects, IOMMUs, GDSC, and CSI input ports, along with the MCLK and reset pinctrl states.

sentences.en: In camss.c, I described milos's capture complex: four CSIPHYs, three CSIDs, three TFEs, their clocks, interconnects, and power domains.
sentences.zh: 在 camss.c 中，我描述了 milos 的捕获复合体：四个 CSIPHY、三个 CSID、三个 TFE、它们的时钟、互连和电源域。

sentences.en: I also registered a new qcom,milos-camss compatible.
sentences.zh: 我还注册了一个新的 qcom，milos-camss 兼容。

sentences.en: In the device tree, I added the camss@ac13000 node with its registers, IRQs, clocks, interconnects, IOMMUs, GDSC, and CSI input ports, along with the MCLK and reset pinctrl states.
sentences.zh: 在设备树中，我添加了 camss@ac13000 节点及其寄存器、IRQ、时钟、互连、IOMMU、GDSC 和 CSI 输入端口，以及 MCLK 和复位 pinctrl 状态。

blocks.html_en: Missing register-bus clock

sentences.en: Missing register-bus clock
sentences.zh: 缺少寄存器总线时钟

blocks.html_en: I ran into a problem at this point. The driver bound, but reading the TFE hardware-version register returned 0x0, and reset timed out as if the block were not powered. The fix was a clock that was not obviously an ISP clock: CAM_CC_SOC_AHB_CLK. It gated the AHB register bus used by the whole camera complex, including the CCI. Without it, register accesses silently returned zero. I added that clock and the CAMNOC AXI clocks, then set the CAMNOC data-path clock rate. The ISP came alive with hw_version = 0x30000000.

sentences.en: I ran into a problem at this point.
sentences.zh: 此时我遇到了问题。

sentences.en: The driver bound, but reading the TFE hardware-version register returned 0x0, and reset timed out as if the block were not powered.
sentences.zh: 驱动程序已绑定，但读取 TFE 硬件版本寄存器返回 0x0，并且复位超时，就像该块未通电一样。

sentences.en: The fix was a clock that was not obviously an ISP clock: CAM_CC_SOC_AHB_CLK.
sentences.zh: 解决方法是使用一个显然不是 ISP 时钟的时钟：CAM_CC_SOC_AHB_CLK。

sentences.en: It gated the AHB register bus used by the whole camera complex, including the CCI.
sentences.zh: 它对整个相机复合体（包括 CCI）使用的 AHB 寄存器总线进行门控。

sentences.en: Without it, register accesses silently returned zero.
sentences.zh: 没有它，寄存器访问会默默地返回零。

sentences.en: I added that clock and the CAMNOC AXI clocks, then set the CAMNOC data-path clock rate.
sentences.zh: 我添加了该时钟和 CAMNOC AXI 时钟，然后设置 CAMNOC 数据路径时钟速率。

sentences.en: The ISP came alive with hw_version = 0x30000000.
sentences.zh: ISP 恢复正常，hw_version = 0x30000000。

blocks.html_en: This suggests that, on Qualcomm hardware, a block that reads as zero may be missing a clock or power domain on its access path.

sentences.en: This suggests that, on Qualcomm hardware, a block that reads as zero may be missing a clock or power domain on its access path.
sentences.zh: 这表明，在高通硬件上，读取为零的块可能在其访问路径上缺少时钟或电源域。

blocks.html_en: Step 2: Bring up the OV13B10 sensor

sentences.en: Step 2: Bring up the OV13B10 sensor
sentences.zh: 第 2 步：调出 OV13B10 传感器

blocks.html_en: The mainline ov13b10 driver exists, but it is written for x86/ACPI laptops and only matches through ACPI. I made changes in two places.

sentences.en: The mainline ov13b10 driver exists, but it is written for x86/ACPI laptops and only matches through ACPI.
sentences.zh: 主线 ov13b10 驱动程序存在，但它是为 x86/ACPI 笔记本电脑编写的，并且仅通过 ACPI 匹配。

sentences.en: I made changes in two places.
sentences.zh: 我在两个地方做了改变。

blocks.html_en: Making the driver usable on ARM and device tree

sentences.en: Making the driver usable on ARM and device tree
sentences.zh: 使驱动程序可在 ARM 和设备树上使用

blocks.html_en: • I added an OpenFirmware match table (ovti,ov13b10) so the driver could probe from the device tree.

sentences.en: I added an OpenFirmware match table (ovti,ov13b10) so the driver could probe from the device tree.
sentences.zh: 我添加了一个 OpenFirmware 匹配表（ovti、ov13b10），以便驱动程序可以从设备树中进行探测。

blocks.html_en: • I described the sensor in milos-fairphone-fp6.dts. It lives on the CCI I2C bus at address 0x36, needs MCLK1 at 19.2 MHz, a reset GPIO, and power rails. For this experimental bring-up, I simply forced the regulators on instead of fully sequencing them.

sentences.en: I described the sensor in milos-fairphone-fp6.dts.
sentences.zh: 我在 milos-fairphone-fp6.dts 中描述了传感器。

sentences.en: It lives on the CCI I2C bus at address 0x36, needs MCLK1 at 19.2 MHz, a reset GPIO, and power rails.
sentences.zh: 它位于地址 0x36 的 CCI I2C 总线上，需要 19.2 MHz 的 MCLK1、复位 GPIO 和电源轨。

sentences.en: For this experimental bring-up, I simply forced the regulators on instead of fully sequencing them.
sentences.zh: 对于这个实验，我只是强制调节器打开，而不是对它们进行完全排序。

blocks.html_en: 2 small details

sentences.en: 2 small details
sentences.zh: 2个小细节

blocks.html_en: • Lane numbering. The downstream device tree used data-lanes = <1 2 3 4>, while mainline's convention is zero-indexed: <0 1 2 3>. With the wrong numbering, CSIPHY programmed a lane mask with lane 0 missing, and the PHY never locked.

sentences.en: Lane numbering.
sentences.zh: 车道编号。

sentences.en: The downstream device tree used data-lanes = <1 2 3 4>, while mainline's convention is zero-indexed: <0 1 2 3>.
sentences.zh: 下游设备树使用 data-lanes = <1 2 3 4>，而主线的约定是零索引：<0 1 2 3>。

sentences.en: With the wrong numbering, CSIPHY programmed a lane mask with lane 0 missing, and the PHY never locked.
sentences.zh: 由于编号错误，CSIPHY 编程了一个通道掩码，其中通道 0 丢失，并且 PHY 从未锁定。

blocks.html_en: • Which CSIPHY? The FP6 wiring routed the ultra-wide camera to CSIPHY1. Getting this from the downstream device tree instead of guessing saved a lot of trial and error.

sentences.en: Which CSIPHY?
sentences.zh: 哪个CSIPHY？

sentences.en: The FP6 wiring routed the ultra-wide camera to CSIPHY1.
sentences.zh: FP6 接线将超宽摄像头连接至 CSIPHY1。

sentences.en: Getting this from the downstream device tree instead of guessing saved a lot of trial and error.
sentences.zh: 从下游设备树获取此信息而不是猜测，可以节省大量的试验和错误。

blocks.html_en: At this point, the sensor probed successfully, the chip ID was read correctly over I2C, CSIPHY reported lane activity, and the ISP produced frames that were completely black.

sentences.en: At this point, the sensor probed successfully, the chip ID was read correctly over I2C, CSIPHY reported lane activity, and the ISP produced frames that were completely black.
sentences.zh: 此时，传感器探测成功，通过 I2C 正确读取芯片 ID，CSIPHY 报告通道活动，ISP 生成全黑的帧。

blocks.html_en: Step 3: The all-zero frames mystery

sentences.en: Step 3: The all-zero frames mystery
sentences.zh: 第三步：全零帧之谜

blocks.html_en: This was the main bug. Frames arrived at the right rate and size, and buf_done fired, but every pixel was zero. That was also true when I enabled the sensor's internal colour-bar test pattern, which was generated inside the sensor and should have appeared regardless of the scene. The data path delivered frame timing, but not pixel data.

sentences.en: This was the main bug.
sentences.zh: 这是主要的错误。

sentences.en: Frames arrived at the right rate and size, and buf_done fired, but every pixel was zero.
sentences.zh: 帧以正确的速率和大小到达，并且 buf_done 触发，但每个像素都为零。

sentences.en: That was also true when I enabled the sensor's internal colour-bar test pattern, which was generated inside the sensor and should have appeared regardless of the scene.
sentences.zh: 当我启用传感器的内部色条测试图案时，情况也是如此，该图案是在传感器内部生成的，无论场景如何，都应该出现。

sentences.en: The data path delivered frame timing, but not pixel data.
sentences.zh: 数据路径传送帧时序，但不传送像素数据。

blocks.html_en: The kernel log provided a clue: VFE0: Bad config violation. The ISP's write engine reported a consumer/config violation once per frame because the write master's configuration did not match the incoming data.

sentences.en: The kernel log provided a clue: VFE0: Bad config violation.
sentences.zh: 内核日志提供了线索：VFE0：错误的配置违规。

sentences.en: The ISP's write engine reported a consumer/config violation once per frame because the write master's configuration did not match the incoming data.
sentences.zh: ISP 的写入引擎每帧报告一次消费者/配置违规，因为写入主机的配置与传入数据不匹配。

blocks.html_en: When I dug into the downstream cam_tfe_bus.c, the difference became clear. The RDI write-master's packer format depends on the ISP bus width:

sentences.en: When I dug into the downstream cam_tfe_bus.c, the difference became clear.
sentences.zh: 当我深入研究下游 cam_tfe_bus.c 时，差异变得很明显。

sentences.en: The RDI write-master's packer format depends on the ISP bus width:
sentences.zh: RDI write-master 的打包格式取决于 ISP 总线宽度：

blocks.html_en: • TFE530 (qcm2290, the target of the mainline driver) has a 64-bit RDI bus, so it uses packer 0xa.

sentences.en: TFE530 (qcm2290, the target of the mainline driver) has a 64-bit RDI bus, so it uses packer 0xa.
sentences.zh: TFE530（qcm2290，主线驱动的目标）具有64位RDI总线，因此它使用打包器0xa。

blocks.html_en: • TFE665 (milos) has a 128-bit RDI bus, so it needs packer 0x0.

sentences.en: TFE665 (milos) has a 128-bit RDI bus, so it needs packer 0x0.
sentences.zh: TFE665（milos）具有128位RDI总线，因此需要打包器0x0。

blocks.html_en: The mainline driver hard-coded the 64-bit value. On milos, that was wrong, and the write engine refused to write the pixels. Changing the register value from PLAIN64 (0xa) to 0x0 turned the all-zero frames into real images: the maximum pixel value was 255, the full colour-bar pattern appeared, and the violations stopped.

sentences.en: The mainline driver hard-coded the 64-bit value.
sentences.zh: 主线驱动程序对 64 位值进行硬编码。

sentences.en: On milos, that was wrong, and the write engine refused to write the pixels.
sentences.zh: 在 milos 上，这是错误的，写入引擎拒绝写入像素。

sentences.en: Changing the register value from PLAIN64 (0xa) to 0x0 turned the all-zero frames into real images: the maximum pixel value was 255, the full colour-bar pattern appeared, and the violations stopped.
sentences.zh: 将寄存器值从 PLAIN64 (0xa) 更改为 0x0 将全零帧变成真实图像：最大像素值为 255，出现完整的彩条图案，并且违规停止。

blocks.html_en: That was the point at which the camera physically worked: OV13B10 → CSIPHY → CSID → TFE665 → DDR, delivering genuine Bayer frames.

sentences.en: That was the point at which the camera physically worked: OV13B10 → CSIPHY → CSID → TFE665 → DDR, delivering genuine Bayer frames.
sentences.zh: 这就是相机实际工作的点：OV13B10 → CSIPHY → CSID → TFE665 → DDR，提供真正的拜耳帧。

blocks.html_en: Step 4: Raw Bayer to libcamera

sentences.en: Step 4: Raw Bayer to libcamera
sentences.zh: 第 4 步：原始 Bayer 到 libcamera

blocks.html_en: Raw frames were enough for a QR script, but a usable camera needs libcamera, the userspace framework used by modern Linux camera applications. libcamera 0.7.2 already recognises the milos qcom-camss graph through its generic simple pipeline handler. Its software ISP debayered the raw frames to RGB, with GPU acceleration on the Adreno through EGL, at approximately 30 fps out of the box. cam and GStreamer's libcamerasrc produced clean images immediately.

sentences.en: Raw frames were enough for a QR script, but a usable camera needs libcamera, the userspace framework used by modern Linux camera applications.
sentences.zh: 原始帧对于 QR 脚本来说已经足够了，但是可用的相机需要 libcamera，这是现代 Linux 相机应用程序使用的用户空间框架。

sentences.en: libcamera 0.7.2 already recognises the milos qcom-camss graph through its generic simple pipeline handler.
sentences.zh: libcamera 0.7.2 已经通过其通用的简单管道处理程序识别 milos qcom-camss 图。

sentences.en: Its software ISP debayered the raw frames to RGB, with GPU acceleration on the Adreno through EGL, at approximately 30 fps out of the box.
sentences.zh: 其软件 ISP 将原始帧去拜耳化为 RGB，并通过 EGL 在 Adreno 上进行 GPU 加速，开箱即用的速度约为 30 fps。

sentences.en: cam and GStreamer's libcamerasrc produced clean images immediately.
sentences.zh: cam 和 GStreamer 的 libcamerasrc 立即生成干净的图像。

blocks.html_en: Auto-exposure was the part that did not work. Images were dark or overly bright, and the log reported Failed to create camera sensor helper for ov13b10. libcamera's software auto-exposure and gain loop needed a small per-sensor helper to map the sensor's gain register value to a real gain multiplier. libcamera includes helpers for several sensors, but not this one.

sentences.en: Auto-exposure was the part that did not work.
sentences.zh: 自动曝光是不起作用的部分。

sentences.en: Images were dark or overly bright, and the log reported Failed to create camera sensor helper for ov13b10.
sentences.zh: 图像太暗或太亮，日志报告无法为 ov13b10 创建相机传感器助手。

sentences.en: libcamera's software auto-exposure and gain loop needed a small per-sensor helper to map the sensor's gain register value to a real gain multiplier.
sentences.zh: libcamera 的软件自动曝光和增益循环需要一个小型的每个传感器助手来将传感器的增益寄存器值映射到实际增益乘数。

sentences.en: libcamera includes helpers for several sensors, but not this one.
sentences.zh: libcamera 包含多个传感器的帮助程序，但不是这个。

blocks.html_en: The fix was small. The OV13B10's analogue gain is linear, with 0x80 = 1×, or gain = code / 128, which is the same behaviour as several other OmniVision sensors. I added a class to libcamera's sensor-helper database:

sentences.en: The fix was small.
sentences.zh: 修复效果很小。

sentences.en: The OV13B10's analogue gain is linear, with 0x80 = 1×, or gain = code / 128, which is the same behaviour as several other OmniVision sensors.
sentences.zh: OV13B10 的模拟增益是线性的，0x80 = 1×，或增益 = code / 128，这与其他几个 OmniVision 传感器的行为相同。

sentences.en: I added a class to libcamera's sensor-helper database:
sentences.zh: 我向 libcamera 的传感器帮助数据库添加了一个类：

blocks.html_en: The auto-exposure loop started converging immediately. I also added an entry to libcamera's sensor-properties database and backported the sensor driver's V4L2 crop and get_selection support, which libcamera uses for pixel-array geometry. After that, GStreamer and PipeWire received a properly exposed feed. Once I installed the PipeWire libcamera plugin, the camera appeared in desktop applications as a normal video source.

sentences.en: The auto-exposure loop started converging immediately.
sentences.zh: 自动曝光循环立即开始收敛。

sentences.en: I also added an entry to libcamera's sensor-properties database and backported the sensor driver's V4L2 crop and get_selection support, which libcamera uses for pixel-array geometry.
sentences.zh: 我还向 libcamera 的传感器属性数据库添加了一个条目，并向后移植了传感器驱动程序的 V4L2 裁剪和 get_selection 支持，libcamera 将其用于像素阵列几何形状。

sentences.en: After that, GStreamer and PipeWire received a properly exposed feed.
sentences.zh: 之后，GStreamer 和 PipeWire 收到了正确暴露的 feed。

sentences.en: Once I installed the PipeWire libcamera plugin, the camera appeared in desktop applications as a normal video source.
sentences.zh: 一旦我安装了 PipeWire libcamera 插件，摄像头就会作为普通视频源出现在桌面应用程序中。

blocks.html_en: The images are still somewhat overexposed in some situations, so the helper might need further work.

sentences.en: The images are still somewhat overexposed in some situations, so the helper might need further work.
sentences.zh: 在某些情况下，图像仍然有些曝光过度，因此帮助者可能需要进一步的工作。

blocks.html_en: Step 5: Focus, orientation, and resolution issues

sentences.en: Step 5: Focus, orientation, and resolution issues
sentences.zh: 第 5 步：焦点、方向和解决问题

blocks.html_en: I still had a few issues to fine-tune.

sentences.en: I still had a few issues to fine-tune.
sentences.zh: 我还有一些问题需要微调。

blocks.html_en: Autofocus

sentences.en: Autofocus
sentences.zh: 自动对焦

blocks.html_en: The ultra-wide camera has a voice-coil motor (VCM) for focus. The downstream device tree suggests that it is an Awinic AW86017. After powering the autofocus rail, which is controlled by a GPIO-driven regulator, and probing the CCI I2C bus, I found a device at address 0x0c that spoke the de facto standard DW9714 10-bit DAC protocol. The mainline dw9714 driver drives it directly.

sentences.en: The ultra-wide camera has a voice-coil motor (VCM) for focus.
sentences.zh: 超广角摄像头配有用于对焦的音圈电机 (VCM)。

sentences.en: The downstream device tree suggests that it is an Awinic AW86017.
sentences.zh: 下游设备树表明它是艾为AW86017。

sentences.en: After powering the autofocus rail, which is controlled by a GPIO-driven regulator, and probing the CCI I2C bus, I found a device at address 0x0c that spoke the de facto standard DW9714 10-bit DAC protocol.
sentences.zh: 在为由 GPIO 驱动的调节器控制的自动对焦轨供电并探测 CCI I2C 总线后，我在地址 0x0c 处发现了一个采用事实上标准 DW9714 10 位 DAC 协议的设备。

sentences.en: The mainline dw9714 driver drives it directly.
sentences.zh: 主线dw9714驱动直接驱动它。

blocks.html_en: A focus sweep confirmed that the lens moved physically and that sharpness peaked clearly at a middle setting. libcamera associated the lens with the sensor through a lens-focus device-tree link.

sentences.en: A focus sweep confirmed that the lens moved physically and that sharpness peaked clearly at a middle setting.
sentences.zh: 焦点扫描证实镜头发生了物理移动，并且清晰度在中间设置时明显达到峰值。

sentences.en: libcamera associated the lens with the sensor through a lens-focus device-tree link.
sentences.zh: libcamera 通过镜头焦点设备树链接将镜头与传感器关联起来。

blocks.html_en: Unfortunately, libcamera's software ISP has no autofocus algorithm. Rather than leave the lens parked at infinity and produce blurry close-ups, I set a sensible fixed focus tuned for arm's-length QR scanning and documents using a small udev rule. The setting could be adjusted as needed, or the focus could be controlled from software.

sentences.en: Unfortunately, libcamera's software ISP has no autofocus algorithm.
sentences.zh: 不幸的是，libcamera 的软件 ISP 没有自动对焦算法。

sentences.en: Rather than leave the lens parked at infinity and produce blurry close-ups, I set a sensible fixed focus tuned for arm's-length QR scanning and documents using a small udev rule.
sentences.zh: 我没有将镜头停在无限远并产生模糊的特写镜头，而是设置了一个合理的固定焦点，调整为一臂长的 QR 扫描和使用小型 udev 规则的文档。

sentences.en: The setting could be adjusted as needed, or the focus could be controlled from software.
sentences.zh: 可以根据需要调整设置，或者可以通过软件控制焦点。

blocks.html_en: Orientation

sentences.en: Orientation
sentences.zh: 方向

blocks.html_en: The sensor is mounted at an angle relative to the phone's portrait orientation, so previews initially appeared sideways. Setting the device-tree rotation and orientation properties allowed libcamera-aware applications to display the feed upright.

sentences.en: The sensor is mounted at an angle relative to the phone's portrait orientation, so previews initially appeared sideways.
sentences.zh: 传感器的安装位置与手机的纵向方向成一定角度，因此预览最初显示为侧面。

sentences.en: Setting the device-tree rotation and orientation properties allowed libcamera-aware applications to display the feed upright.
sentences.zh: 设置设备树旋转和方向属性允许支持 libcamera 的应用程序垂直显示提要。

blocks.html_en: Binned modes

sentences.en: Binned modes
sentences.zh: 分档模式

blocks.html_en: The OV13B10 driver advertised several resolutions, including 2×2-binned half-resolution modes. On this CAMSS path, the binned modes produced garbled, sheared output. Their readout geometry did not match the declared frame size, while full-resolution and a couple of other modes were clean.

sentences.en: The OV13B10 driver advertised several resolutions, including 2×2-binned half-resolution modes.
sentences.zh: OV13B10 驱动程序宣传了多种分辨率，包括 2×2 分档半分辨率模式。

sentences.en: On this CAMSS path, the binned modes produced garbled, sheared output.
sentences.zh: 在此 CAMSS 路径上，分箱模式会产生乱码、剪切输出。

sentences.en: Their readout geometry did not match the declared frame size, while full-resolution and a couple of other modes were clean.
sentences.zh: 它们的读出几何形状与声明的帧大小不匹配，而全分辨率和其他几种模式是干净的。

blocks.html_en: Rather than ship a broken preview, I disabled the two broken modes so libcamera would select only working ones. The trade-off is that, because the software ISP crops instead of scaling, a 1080p preview is a centre crop of a larger mode. It is slightly zoomed in rather than showing the full ultra-wide field of view.

sentences.en: Rather than ship a broken preview, I disabled the two broken modes so libcamera would select only working ones.
sentences.zh: 我没有提供损坏的预览，而是禁用了两种损坏的模式，这样 libcamera 只会选择工作模式。

sentences.en: The trade-off is that, because the software ISP crops instead of scaling, a 1080p preview is a centre crop of a larger mode.
sentences.zh: 需要权衡的是，由于软件 ISP 进行裁剪而不是缩放，因此 1080p 预览是较大模式的中心裁剪。

sentences.en: It is slightly zoomed in rather than showing the full ultra-wide field of view.
sentences.zh: 它稍微放大，而不是显示完整的超宽视野。

blocks.html_en: The result is a live, upright, auto-exposed, in-focus preview in GNOME Camera / Snapshot, and QR scanning works.

sentences.en: The result is a live, upright, auto-exposed, in-focus preview in GNOME Camera / Snapshot, and QR scanning works.
sentences.zh: 结果是在 GNOME 相机/快照和 QR 扫描中实现实时、直立、自动曝光、对焦的预览。

blocks.html_en: Sources

sentences.en: Sources
sentences.zh: 来源

blocks.html_en: The patches and related files needed to reproduce these results are available in this repository:

sentences.en: The patches and related files needed to reproduce these results are available in this repository:
sentences.zh: 重现这些结果所需的补丁和相关文件可在此存储库中找到：

blocks.html_en: github.com/nondescriptpointer/fairphone6-wide-camera-linux

sentences.en: github.com/nondescriptpointer/fairphone6-wide-camera-linux

blocks.html_en: Limitations

sentences.en: Limitations
sentences.zh: 局限性

blocks.html_en: This is an experimental start, not production camera support.

sentences.en: This is an experimental start, not production camera support.
sentences.zh: 这是一个实验性的开始，而不是生产相机支持。

blocks.html_en: • Only the ultra-wide (OV13B10) works. The main (IMX896) and front (S5KKD1) sensors have no mainline drivers.

sentences.en: Only the ultra-wide (OV13B10) works.
sentences.zh: 只有超宽 (OV13B10) 有效。

sentences.en: The main (IMX896) and front (S5KKD1) sensors have no mainline drivers.
sentences.zh: 主传感器 (IMX896) 和前置传感器 (S5KKD1) 没有主线驱动器。

blocks.html_en: • There is no autofocus. libcamera's software ISP has no contrast-AF loop, so focus is a fixed compromise position. Proper autofocus would require an AF algorithm in the software ISP or an app-side loop to drive the VCM.

sentences.en: There is no autofocus.
sentences.zh: 没有自动对焦。

sentences.en: libcamera's software ISP has no contrast-AF loop, so focus is a fixed compromise position.
sentences.zh: libcamera 的软件 ISP 没有对比度 AF 环，因此焦点是一个固定的折衷位置。

sentences.en: Proper autofocus would require an AF algorithm in the software ISP or an app-side loop to drive the VCM.
sentences.zh: 正确的自动对焦需要软件 ISP 中的 AF 算法或应用程序端循环来驱动 VCM。

blocks.html_en: • The preview field of view is cropped at common resolutions because the 2×2-binned sensor modes are broken on this path and the software ISP crops instead of scaling. Fixing the binned-mode register sequences, or adding a scaler, would restore the full ultra-wide field of view.

sentences.en: The preview field of view is cropped at common resolutions because the 2×2-binned sensor modes are broken on this path and the software ISP crops instead of scaling.
sentences.zh: 预览视场以常见分辨率进行裁剪，因为 2×2 分箱传感器模式在此路径上被破坏，并且软件 ISP 进行裁剪而不是缩放。

sentences.en: Fixing the binned-mode register sequences, or adding a scaler, would restore the full ultra-wide field of view.
sentences.zh: 修复合并模式寄存器序列或添加定标器将恢复完整的超宽视野。

blocks.html_en: • Power sequencing is simplified. Regulators are forced on instead of being sequenced, and the VCM draws a little idle current while held at a fixed focus position. This is fine for experimentation, but needs proper power management for daily use.

sentences.en: Power sequencing is simplified.
sentences.zh: 电源排序得到简化。

sentences.en: Regulators are forced on instead of being sequenced, and the VCM draws a little idle current while held at a fixed focus position.
sentences.zh: 调节器被强制开启而不是按顺序排列，并且 VCM 在保持在固定焦点位置时会消耗一点空闲电流。

sentences.en: This is fine for experimentation, but needs proper power management for daily use.
sentences.zh: 这对于实验来说很好，但在日常使用中需要适当的电源管理。

blocks.html_en: • The ISP is software-only. All debayering, auto-exposure, and auto-white-balance processing happens in software, with GPU assistance. It works well for QR scanning and casual use, but does not provide the image quality of a tuned hardware ISP pipeline.

sentences.en: The ISP is software-only.
sentences.zh: ISP 是纯软件的。

sentences.en: All debayering, auto-exposure, and auto-white-balance processing happens in software, with GPU assistance.
sentences.zh: 所有去拜耳、自动曝光和自动白平衡处理均在软件中进行，并有 GPU 协助。

sentences.en: It works well for QR scanning and casual use, but does not provide the image quality of a tuned hardware ISP pipeline.
sentences.zh: 它适用于 QR 扫描和休闲使用，但无法提供经过调整的硬件 ISP 管道的图像质量。

blocks.html_en: • I did not spend time optimising image quality. Further optimisation is likely needed to get better photos from the sensor.

sentences.en: I did not spend time optimising image quality.
sentences.zh: 我没有花时间优化图像质量。

sentences.en: Further optimisation is likely needed to get better photos from the sensor.
sentences.zh: 可能需要进一步优化才能从传感器获得更好的照片。

blocks.html_en: Next steps

sentences.en: Next steps
sentences.zh: 后续步骤

blocks.html_en: • Fix the binned modes to restore the full field of view.

sentences.en: Fix the binned modes to restore the full field of view.
sentences.zh: 修复合并模式以恢复完整视野。

blocks.html_en: • Write proper power sequencing.

sentences.en: Write proper power sequencing.
sentences.zh: 编写正确的电源排序。

blocks.html_en: • Prepare the parts that are ready for upstreaming.

sentences.en: Prepare the parts that are ready for upstreaming.
sentences.zh: 准备好用于上游的部件。

content_html_zh:
发表于 2026 年 7 月 21 日

背景

Fairphone 6 是主线 Linux 和 postmarketOS 的一个有趣目标，原因如下：

  • 与大多数其他受支持的 postmarketOS 设备相比，它具有相对现代的硬件。
  • Fairphone 投资于主线 Linux 支持，Luca Weiss 推动了大部分开发。
  • 这些努力已经为硬件提供了有希望的初步支持。
  • Fairphone 故意允许使用替代操作系统。
  • Fairphone 的目标是长期支持其设备，以便手机可以为未来的工作提供稳定的基础。

使该设备普遍可用仍然有两个主要障碍：板载音频和摄像头支持。 我正在开展一个需要二维码扫描的项目，因此我以此为契机，看看是否可以让至少一台相机正常工作。 免责声明：我在很大程度上依赖法学硕士的帮助来完成这项工作。

Fairphone 6 相机

Fairphone 6 具有三个摄像头：

  • 后置：索尼IMX896
  • 正面：三星S5KKD1
  • 广角：OmniVision OV13B10

Sony 和 Samsung 传感器没有主线 Linux 驱动程序，但 OmniVision OV13B10 有主线驱动程序。 超广角摄像头足以进行二维码扫描。

手机摄像头不是一个单一的设备。 在 Qualcomm SoC 上，捕获路径是一条链：

image sensor  →  CSI-2 D-PHY  →  CSIPHY  →  CSID  →  ISP (VFE/TFE)  →  memory
   (I2C)         (MIPI lanes)   (decode)   (demux)   (write engine)     (DMA)

还有几个支持组件，包括相机时钟控制器 (camcc)、CCI（高通专用相机 I2C 控制器）、电源轨和用于自动对焦的 VCM（音圈电机）。

下游供应商 Android 内核通过 Qualcomm 强大的专有 CAMX/cam 内核堆栈驱动所有这一切。 在主线上，等效的是更小的 qcom-camss 驱动程序，其中 libcamera 提供用户空间集成和图像处理。

为了让 OmniVision 摄像头正常工作，我必须向 qcom-camss 传授 SoC 的特定模块、描述设备树中的硬件、启用传感器驱动程序并配置 libcamera 以将原始拜耳帧转换为应用程序可以使用的图像。

初步探索

在开始实施之前，我想了解有多少工作是新的，有多少可以从主线已经支持的硬件移植。 这将表明该项目在没有制造商支持的情况下是否可行。

最初的研究令人鼓舞：

  • FP6的SoC是高通milos（SM7635）。 下游板代号为火山，postmarketOS 已经使用基于主线的内核分支启动它。
  • 相机硬件模块为TFE665（瘦前端ISP）、CSID665和CSIPHY v2.2.1。
  • camcc 时钟控制器和 CCI 已存在于内核分支中。
  • 三颗摄像头分别是： 主摄像头：Sony IMX896，无主线驱动。 超宽：OmniVision OV13B10，带有仅支持 ACPI/x86 的主线驱动程序。 正面：三星S5KKD1，无主线驱动程序。

这使得目标显而易见：OV13B10 超宽。 它是一款带有现有主线驱动器的 13 MP 传感器，其宽视场适合 QR 扫描。

当我将下游寄存器头（cam_tfe665.h、cam_csiphy_2_2_1_hwreg.h 和 cam_tfe_bus.c）与主线 qcom-camss 进行比较时，我发现 TFE665 与主线已经支持的 TFE530 本质上是相同的 IP。 寄存器布局是相同的。 只有内部块的基址偏移不同，因为写总线位于不同的地址。 同样，CSID665 RDI 寄存器与支持的 CSID 匹配，CSIPHY v2.2.1 属于相同的三相 PHY 系列。

这意味着我可以移植现有的驱动程序，而不是从头开始编写所有内容。

第 1 步：将捕获子系统移植到内核中

qcom-camss 在 milos 上尚不可用，因此我必须连接现有的部分。

TFE665 ISP 驱动程序

我添加了一个新的 camss-vfe-665.c，直接在主线 TFE530 驱动程序 (camss-vfe-340.c) 上建模。 由于寄存器内容相同，因此驱动程序逻辑相同。 主要区别在于 milos 将 ISP 控制块和写总线块放置在不同的偏移处。 总线寄存器基址从 0xa00 移动到 0x1800，封装该偏移量移位占据了大部分工作。

CSID665 和 CSIPHY v2.2.1

  • CSID665 重用了现有的第 2 代 CSID 操作，因为它的 RDI 寄存器偏移量是相同的。
  • 此版本的 CSIPHY v2.2.1 需要新的通道配置表和 D-PHY 调整值。 我从下游 cam_csiphy_2_2_1_hwreg.h 转录了通道寄存器序列以及大约 1.1 Gbps/通道（“500 Msps”）数据速率和 AFE 设置。 PHY 的寄存器窗口位于偏移量 0x1000 处。

资源、兼容和设备树

在 camss.c 中，我描述了 milos 的捕获复合体：四个 CSIPHY、三个 CSID、三个 TFE、它们的时钟、互连和电源域。 我还注册了一个新的 qcom，milos-camss 兼容。 在设备树中，我添加了 camss@ac13000 节点及其寄存器、IRQ、时钟、互连、IOMMU、GDSC 和 CSI 输入端口，以及 MCLK 和复位 pinctrl 状态。

缺少寄存器总线时钟

此时我遇到了问题。 驱动程序已绑定，但读取 TFE 硬件版本寄存器返回 0x0，并且复位超时，就像该块未通电一样。 解决方法是使用一个显然不是 ISP 时钟的时钟：CAM_CC_SOC_AHB_CLK。 它对整个相机复合体（包括 CCI）使用的 AHB 寄存器总线进行门控。 没有它，寄存器访问会默默地返回零。 我添加了该时钟和 CAMNOC AXI 时钟，然后设置 CAMNOC 数据路径时钟速率。 ISP 恢复正常，hw_version = 0x30000000。

这表明，在高通硬件上，读取为零的块可能在其访问路径上缺少时钟或电源域。

第 2 步：调出 OV13B10 传感器

主线 ov13b10 驱动程序存在，但它是为 x86/ACPI 笔记本电脑编写的，并且仅通过 ACPI 匹配。 我在两个地方做了改变。

使驱动程序可在 ARM 和设备树上使用

  • 我添加了一个 OpenFirmware 匹配表（ovti、ov13b10），以便驱动程序可以从设备树中进行探测。
  • 我在 milos-fairphone-fp6.dts 中描述了传感器。 它位于地址 0x36 的 CCI I2C 总线上，需要 19.2 MHz 的 MCLK1、复位 GPIO 和电源轨。 对于这个实验，我只是强制调节器打开，而不是对它们进行完全排序。

2个小细节

  1. 车道编号。 下游设备树使用 data-lanes = <1 2 3 4>，而主线的约定是零索引：<0 1 2 3>。 由于编号错误，CSIPHY 编程了一个通道掩码，其中通道 0 丢失，并且 PHY 从未锁定。
  2. 哪个CSIPHY？ FP6 接线将超宽摄像头连接至 CSIPHY1。 从下游设备树获取此信息而不是猜测，可以节省大量的试验和错误。

此时，传感器探测成功，通过 I2C 正确读取芯片 ID，CSIPHY 报告通道活动，ISP 生成全黑的帧。

第三步：全零帧之谜

这是主要的错误。 帧以正确的速率和大小到达，并且 buf_done 触发，但每个像素都为零。 当我启用传感器的内部色条测试图案时，情况也是如此，该图案是在传感器内部生成的，无论场景如何，都应该出现。 数据路径传送帧时序，但不传送像素数据。

内核日志提供了线索：VFE0：错误的配置违规。 ISP 的写入引擎每帧报告一次消费者/配置违规，因为写入主机的配置与传入数据不匹配。

当我深入研究下游 cam_tfe_bus.c 时，差异变得很明显。 RDI write-master 的打包格式取决于 ISP 总线宽度：

  • TFE530（qcm2290，主线驱动的目标）具有64位RDI总线，因此它使用打包器0xa。
  • TFE665（milos）具有128位RDI总线，因此需要打包器0x0。

主线驱动程序对 64 位值进行硬编码。 在 milos 上，这是错误的，写入引擎拒绝写入像素。 将寄存器值从 PLAIN64 (0xa) 更改为 0x0 将全零帧变成真实图像：最大像素值为 255，出现完整的彩条图案，并且违规停止。

这就是相机实际工作的点：OV13B10 → CSIPHY → CSID → TFE665 → DDR，提供真正的拜耳帧。

第 4 步：原始 Bayer 到 libcamera

原始帧对于 QR 脚本来说已经足够了，但是可用的相机需要 libcamera，这是现代 Linux 相机应用程序使用的用户空间框架。 libcamera 0.7.2 已经通过其通用的简单管道处理程序识别 milos qcom-camss 图。 其软件 ISP 将原始帧去拜耳化为 RGB，并通过 EGL 在 Adreno 上进行 GPU 加速，开箱即用的速度约为 30 fps。 cam 和 GStreamer 的 libcamerasrc 立即生成干净的图像。

自动曝光是不起作用的部分。 图像太暗或太亮，日志报告无法为 ov13b10 创建相机传感器助手。 libcamera 的软件自动曝光和增益循环需要一个小型的每个传感器助手来将传感器的增益寄存器值映射到实际增益乘数。 libcamera 包含多个传感器的帮助程序，但不是这个。

修复效果很小。 OV13B10 的模拟增益是线性的，0x80 = 1×，或增益 = code / 128，这与其他几个 OmniVision 传感器的行为相同。 我向 libcamera 的传感器帮助数据库添加了一个类：

class CameraSensorHelperOv13b10 : public CameraSensorHelper {
public:
    CameraSensorHelperOv13b10() { gain_ = AnalogueGainLinear{ 1, 0, 0, 128 }; }
};
REGISTER_CAMERA_SENSOR_HELPER("ov13b10", CameraSensorHelperOv13b10)

自动曝光循环立即开始收敛。 我还向 libcamera 的传感器属性数据库添加了一个条目，并向后移植了传感器驱动程序的 V4L2 裁剪和 get_selection 支持，libcamera 将其用于像素阵列几何形状。 之后，GStreamer 和 PipeWire 收到了正确暴露的 feed。 一旦我安装了 PipeWire libcamera 插件，摄像头就会作为普通视频源出现在桌面应用程序中。

在某些情况下，图像仍然有些曝光过度，因此帮助者可能需要进一步的工作。

第 5 步：焦点、方向和解决问题

我还有一些问题需要微调。

自动对焦

超广角摄像头配有用于对焦的音圈电机 (VCM)。 下游设备树表明它是艾为AW86017。 在为由 GPIO 驱动的调节器控制的自动对焦轨供电并探测 CCI I2C 总线后，我在地址 0x0c 处发现了一个采用事实上标准 DW9714 10 位 DAC 协议的设备。 主线dw9714驱动直接驱动它。

焦点扫描证实镜头发生了物理移动，并且清晰度在中间设置时明显达到峰值。 libcamera 通过镜头焦点设备树链接将镜头与传感器关联起来。

不幸的是，libcamera 的软件 ISP 没有自动对焦算法。 我没有将镜头停在无限远并产生模糊的特写镜头，而是设置了一个合理的固定焦点，调整为一臂长的 QR 扫描和使用小型 udev 规则的文档。 可以根据需要调整设置，或者可以通过软件控制焦点。

方向

传感器的安装位置与手机的纵向方向成一定角度，因此预览最初显示为侧面。 设置设备树旋转和方向属性允许支持 libcamera 的应用程序垂直显示提要。

分档模式

OV13B10 驱动程序宣传了多种分辨率，包括 2×2 分档半分辨率模式。 在此 CAMSS 路径上，分箱模式会产生乱码、剪切输出。 它们的读出几何形状与声明的帧大小不匹配，而全分辨率和其他几种模式是干净的。

我没有提供损坏的预览，而是禁用了两种损坏的模式，这样 libcamera 只会选择工作模式。 需要权衡的是，由于软件 ISP 进行裁剪而不是缩放，因此 1080p 预览是较大模式的中心裁剪。 它稍微放大，而不是显示完整的超宽视野。

结果是在 GNOME 相机/快照和 QR 扫描中实现实时、直立、自动曝光、对焦的预览。

来源

重现这些结果所需的补丁和相关文件可在此存储库中找到：

github.com/nondescriptpointer/fairphone6-wide-camera-linux

局限性

这是一个实验性的开始，而不是生产相机支持。

  • 只有超宽 (OV13B10) 有效。 主传感器 (IMX896) 和前置传感器 (S5KKD1) 没有主线驱动器。
  • 没有自动对焦。 libcamera 的软件 ISP 没有对比度 AF 环，因此焦点是一个固定的折衷位置。 正确的自动对焦需要软件 ISP 中的 AF 算法或应用程序端循环来驱动 VCM。
  • 预览视场以常见分辨率进行裁剪，因为 2×2 分箱传感器模式在此路径上被破坏，并且软件 ISP 进行裁剪而不是缩放。 修复合并模式寄存器序列或添加定标器将恢复完整的超宽视野。
  • 电源排序得到简化。 调节器被强制开启而不是按顺序排列，并且 VCM 在保持在固定焦点位置时会消耗一点空闲电流。 这对于实验来说很好，但在日常使用中需要适当的电源管理。
  • ISP 是纯软件的。 所有去拜耳、自动曝光和自动白平衡处理均在软件中进行，并有 GPU 协助。 它适用于 QR 扫描和休闲使用，但无法提供经过调整的硬件 ISP 管道的图像质量。
  • 我没有花时间优化图像质量。 可能需要进一步优化才能从传感器获得更好的照片。

后续步骤

  • 修复合并模式以恢复完整视野。
  • 编写正确的电源排序。
  • 准备好用于上游的部件。
